experiences.title: Firmware Developer (Remote Internship)
description: Developing BLE Peripheral firmware on nRF5340 DK using nRF Connect SDK and Zephyr RTOS.
Implementing custom GATT services, connectable advertising, and connection lifecycle management.
Managing dual-core sysbuild configuration: Application Core (BLE Host) and Network Core (BLE Controller via ipc_radio).

experiences.title: Freelance ROS 2 Developer
description: Providing ROS 2 package development and code review services to international clients.
Skills: ROS 2 Package development, C++, Python, Linux.

experiences.title: Freelance Web Developer
description: Developing responsive production websites for Yehi (Australia) and VirtusCo (India) using Next.js and React.js.
Deployed and maintaining virtusco.in; implementing SEO, performance optimizations, and server-side rendering.
Achieved 90+ Lighthouse scores on deployed projects.

experiences.title: Engineer Intern
description: Gained industrial exposure to end-to-end manufacturing workflows across electrical, mechanical, and automated production lines.
Experience in premium horn manufacturing, facility design, and quality control.

experiences.title: Industrial Trainee
experiences.company: Kerala Electrical and Allied Engineering Co. Ltd. (KEALCO)
description: Assembled, wound, and tested high-voltage step-down power transformers.
Expertise in core winding, insulation systems, mineral oil cooling, and pre-dispatch quality testing.

experiences.title: Robotics Intern
description: Gained foundational embedded systems experience: Arduino, ESP8266/ESP32, sensors, motor drivers.
Worked with Linux environments, CLI, and IoT frameworks (Blynk, IFTTT).
Recognised as Best Performer.

organizations.title: Founder
description: Founded a web and AI studio delivering Next.js/WordPress websites, Flutter mobile apps, and AI-powered WhatsApp/Telegram chatbots (OpenClaw) for local businesses.
One paid client project delivered end-to-end; managing scope, pricing, hosting, and handoff.

organizations.title: Co-founder & CTO
description: Co-founded VirtusCo with a team of 5 to build Virtus, an autonomous B2B airport luggage porter robot.
Sole software architect: built the full ROS 2 Jazzy stack from scratch on Raspberry Pi 5.
Wrote a complete YDLidar X4 Pro ROS 2 driver from scratch (no vendor SDK).
Designed ESP32 Kalman filter fusing ToF, ultrasonic, and microwave sensors for obstacle proximity.
Shortlisted for IEDC startup incubation; targeting BIAL Startup Valley.

organizations.title: Apptronics Event Coordinator
organizations.company: Rajagiri School of Engineering and Technology
description: Coordinating science and technology events at RSET's Apptronics technical fest.

organizations.title: Head of Electronics Club
organizations.company: Model Technical Higher Secondary School, IHRD
description: Led and mentored three batches of 15 students in electronics and embedded systems projects over 4 years.
Organised workshops, tech fests, and project-based learning initiatives.

awards.title: Award of Appreciation
awards.description: Recognised for contributions to the Robo-Based Mobile Sensing System for Indoor Air Flow Measurement (KULIRMA Fan, VM Associates consultancy project).

awards.title: Product Design, Development and Delivery
awards.description: Certification for the KULIRMA indoor air flow measurement system.

awards.title: Podium Finish — RC Electric ATV Competition
awards.description: Competed against 12 colleges; showcased expertise in embedded systems and motor control.

awards.title: Best Performer — Robotics Intermediate Certification
awards.description: Excelling in robotics design, programming, and implementation.

awards.title: Top Performer — K.I.T.E. Technical Training
awards.description: Top performer in technical training and educational initiatives under KITE.
